title: Automated Code Generation
scenario: Generate a C++ class that represents a rectangle. The class should have attributes for width and height, and methods for calculating the area and perimeter of the rectangle. The class should be defined in a namespace named 'geometry'.
constraints: Class should be defined in a namespace named 'geometry'
Class should have attributes for width and height
Class should have methods for calculating area and perimeter

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the class is defined correctly and has the correct attributes and methods.
Check if the class is defined inside the correct namespace.
Check if the class attributes are defined correctly.
Check if the class methods are defined correctly.
